rule CDB_PPTAgent_Arbitrary_Code_Execution_via_Py {
    meta:

        description = "Detection for PPTAgent: Arbitrary Code Execution via Python eval() of LLM-Generated Code with "
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-05"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
